page.title: Template:Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan

revision.comment: /* top */Switched to more comprehensive documentation ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/SdkbBot 4|task 4]])
revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[Shogunate|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[Shogunate|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[Shogunate|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|12=draft}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|12=draft}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|12=draft}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|12=draft}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[Shogunate|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[Shogunate|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
revision.text: {{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{Navbox | name = Shogunates and buke regimes of Japan | title = [[:en:Shogun|Shogunates]] and {{ill|Buke regime|lt=buke regimes|ja|武家政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke regime|qq=}} of Japan | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | list1 = * [[File:Ageha-cho.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Taira regime|ja|平氏政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira regime|qq=}} (1167–1185) * [[File:Sasa Rindo.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (1192–1333) * [[File:Ashikaga mon.svg|16x16px]] [[:en:Ashikaga shogunate|Ashikaga shogunate]] (1338–1573) * [[File:Oda emblem.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Oda regime|ja|織田政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda regime|qq=}} (1568–1583) * [[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|16x16px]] {{ill|Toyotomi regime|ja|豊臣政権|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi regime|qq=}} (1585–1603) * [[File:Mitsubaaoi.svg|16x16px]] [[Tokugawa shogunate]] (1603–1868) }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
